creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

here is a new port :)

Light and dark colorful Gtk3.20+ theme

Supported Desktop Environments:

* Cinnamon
* Gnome-Shell
* Metacity
* Xfce

WWW: https://github.com/daniruiz/skeuos-gtk


The diff have been uploaded as: http://Alexander88207.de/Tempfiles/skeuos-gtk-themes-20211006.diff

Thank you in advance!
